ordination + metadata joins)

and environment setup for optional extras

success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all expected nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
High import feasibility (0.92) and low intrusiveness risk enabled adapter_mode=import rather than invasive wrapping.
Repository structure and core modules were correctly discovered, producing broad endpoint coverage across io/sequence/tree/stats/diversity/metadata.
Generated MCP plugin started successfully (service_health=healthy, transport=stdio), indicating baseline runtime viability.
failure_reasons: Quality gap: original project tests were not executed/passing in this run (passed=false, execution_time=0, empty test files), so functional parity is unverified.
DeepWiki analysis failed, reducing external semantic enrichment and confidence in autogenerated prioritization.
Generation metadata appears incomplete/inaccurate (tool_endpoints=0, total_lines_of_code=0, generated_files_size=0 despite files/endpoints present), indicating observability/reporting defects.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully via zip_fallback; repository ingestion worked reliably for a medium-complexity codebase (346 files).
node_performance.analysis_time: Successful and substantive (package/dependency/risk/core-module extraction completed); no per-node timing provided, but total workflow duration (~202s) is reasonable.
node_performance.generation_time: Successful file generation with adapter/import architecture and endpoint exposure; however reporting counters for LOC/size/endpoints are inconsistent.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin health check passed, but comprehensive automated endpoint/integration tests were effectively absent; this is the largest execution-quality deficit.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Not measurable from provided telemetry (reported 0 MB). Instrumentation appears missing rather than truly zero usage.
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Not measurable from provided telemetry (reported 0%). Add runtime profiling to validate generation and startup efficiency.
resource_usage.disk_usage: Not measurable from provided telemetry (reported 0 size), but generated artifact set is small and operationally lightweight.
